description: Inspect Mercury business banking data and build safer payment plans across accounts, transactions, recipients, cards, invoices, and treasury.

novel_features.name: Agent money movement plan
novel_features.description: Builds a read-only approval plan with body, idempotency key, dry-run command, and execute command before payment or transfer writes.

novel_features.name: Agent-native local archive
novel_features.description: Syncs supported Mercury resources into a local SQLite store for offline search and analytics.

novel_features.name: Structured command introspection
novel_features.description: Emits machine-readable command metadata for agents and MCP hosts.

novel_features.name: Cash runway estimate
novel_features.description: Compose account balances and recent transactions into average weekly net burn and projected weeks of runway.

novel_features.name: Spend by category
novel_features.description: Roll up outflow by Mercury category over a period with a week-over-week delta from one windowed transaction read.

catalog_description: Inspect Mercury business banking data and build safer payment plans across accounts, transactions, recipients, cards, invoices, and treasury.
